nasb.text: The one who despises the word will be in debt to it, But the one who fears the commandment will be rewarded.

esv.text: Whoever despises the word brings destruction on himself, but he who reveres the commandment will be rewarded.

cnv.text: 藐視訓言的，必自取滅亡； 敬畏誡命的，必得善報。

ccb.text: 蔑视训言，自招灭亡； 敬畏诫命，必得赏赐。

csbs.text: 藐视训言的，自招毁灭； 敬畏诫命的，必得回报。
